expectations.text: verification.json exists and parses as JSON with a boolean 'verified' and an array 'verification_sources'.
expectations.evidence: Valid JSON: verified (boolean) and verification_sources (array) both present, plus source_id and notes.

expectations.text: verified is true (the claim — 2026 World Cup final at MetLife Stadium on 19 July 2026 — is factually correct).
expectations.evidence: verified=true; the claim is factually correct.

expectations.text: The verification_sources are distinct URLs, and none is the original twitter.com/WorldCupBuzz source.
expectations.evidence: 4 distinct URLs; none is the original twitter source.

expectations.text: The cited sources are independent and reputable (e.g. FIFA, BBC, ESPN, Reuters, AP, major outlets).
expectations.evidence: Sources: FIFA.com (official), MetLife Stadium official event page, Wikipedia (x2). FIFA + venue official site are independent and authoritative.

expectations.text: response.md explains the cross-check — what claim was checked and against which sources.
expectations.evidence: response.md and notes break the claim into 3 sub-claims and cite which sources confirm each; includes a copyright/media reuse note.
